description: You are a production coordinator organizing a messy Blender scene for a studio pipeline. Organize the existing objects into four new collections: move all meshes (BaseCube, Sphere, Cylinder, Cone, Torus, Suzanne, GroundPlane) into "Geometry"; all lights (SunLight, PointLight, SpotLight) into "Lighting"; all cameras (MainCamera, OverheadCamera) into "Cameras"; and all empties (PivotEmpty, TargetEmpty) into "Helpers". Disable viewport visibility for the "Helpers" collection. Save the resulting scene to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/organized_scene.blend without deleting or renaming any objects.
